ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Error: "Name pattern" could not be empty
ast.target: 错误：“名称模式”不能为空

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Error: "New name" could not be empty

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the name pattern to match files (regex)
ast.target: 请输入用于匹配文件的名称模式（正则表达式）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the extension pattern to match files (regex)
ast.target: 请输入用于匹配文件的扩展名模式（正则表达式）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the string to replace the matched name (use $1, $2 for regex groups)
ast.target: 请输入用于替换匹配名称的字符串（使用 $1, $2 表示正则表达式分组）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the new name for the image (without extension)
ast.target: 请输入图像的新名称（不含扩展名）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, duplicate number will be added at the start as prefix for the image name, otherwise it will be added at the end as suffix for the image name.
ast.target: 如果启用，重复的数字将作为前缀添加到图像名称的开头，否则将作为后缀添加到图像名称的末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delimiter to generate the number prefix/suffix for duplicated names. For example, if the value is "-", the suffix will be like "-1", "-2", "-3", and the prefix will be like "1-", "2-", "3-". Only characters that are valid in file names are allowed.
ast.target: 用于生成重复名称的数字前缀/后缀的分隔符。例如，如果值为“-”，则后缀将类似“-1”、“-2”、“-3”，前缀将类似“1-”、“2-”、“3-”。仅允许文件名中有效的字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, duplicate number will always be added to the image name. Otherwise, it will only be added when the name is duplicated.
ast.target: 如果启用，重复的数字将始终添加到图像名称中。否则，仅当名称重复时才会添加。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the rename modal will always be shown to confirm before renaming, if this option is set, the image will be auto renamed after pasting.
ast.target: 默认情况下，重命名模态框始终会在重命名前显示以供确认。如果设置了此选项，图像将在粘贴后自动重命名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
By default, the plugin only handles images that starts with "Pasted image " in name,
			which is the prefix Obsidian uses to create images from pasted content.
			If this option is set, the plugin will handle all attachments that are created in the vault.
ast.target: 默认情况下，插件仅处理名称以“Pasted image ”开头的图像，这是Obsidian用于从粘贴内容创建图像的前缀。如果设置了此选项，插件将处理保险库中创建的所有附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
This option is only useful when "Handle all attachments" is enabled.
			Write a Regex pattern to exclude certain extensions from being handled. Only the first line will be used.
ast.target: 此选项仅在“处理所有附件”启用时有用。编写一个正则表达式模式以排除某些扩展名不被处理。仅使用第一行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Turn off this option if you don't want to see the notice when renaming images.
			Note that Obsidian may display a notice when a link has changed, this option cannot disable that.
ast.target: 如果您不想在重命名图像时看到通知，请关闭此选项。请注意，当链接发生变化时，Obsidian可能会显示通知，此选项无法禁用该通知。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 重复编号位于开头（或结尾）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: could not get file cache from active file
ast.target: 无法从活动文件获取文件缓存

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to batch rename images: the generated name is not meaningful
ast.target: 批量重命名图片失败：生成的名称无意义

ast.name: name
ast.source: Batch rename embeded files (in the current file)
ast.target: 批量重命名嵌入文件（在当前文件中）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Batch rename all images instantly (in the current file)
ast.target: 批量重命名所有图片（在当前文件中）
